modals.deleteText: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this stash?

create.title: Create stash
create.subtitle: An encrypted message that will be delivered to the recipient at the right moment
create.messagePlaceholder: Enter the message text that will be encrypted and sent...
create.keyPlaceholder: Enter or generate an encryption key
create.keyHint: This key encrypts your message in the browser before it's sent. The server never sees it. Share it with the recipient through a separate channel.
create.error: Failed to create stash. Please try again.
create.savedMessage: Save this key now. It is never stored anywhere and cannot be recovered later.

unlock.invalidMessage: This link is invalid or has expired.
unlock.title: Enter your key
unlock.subtitle: Enter the decryption key you were given to view this message
unlock.error: Failed to unlock. Please check your key and try again.
